description: Style Note rasasi impresses and flatters your senses with their unique fragrances that last long and keep you smelling fresh. These are fragrances that will please the royals just as it would appeal to your more earthy senses. Each and every one of their perfumes are keepers. This perfume for women expresses sensual boldness evoking a youthful feeling. Product Details Rasasi Blue Lady is a women's perfume spray which has a flowery, woody and amber fragrance. The top notes are violet leaves, ylang - ylang, tuberose and orange blossom. The middle notes are peach, plum, narcissus and jasmine. Base notes are sandalwood, vetiver, vanilla, amber and musk. The perfume is bottled curvy blue flask with a golden collar while the clear cap resembles a women's hat. Comes with a free deo spray inside Size 40 ml
